diary_entries.entry: The aurora changed everything. I feel pragmatic about our future here.
The aurora changed everything. I feel optimistic about our future here.
Population: 34. Rare Martian aurora lights the sky. I spent the year on terraforming. Closest to Juno-28.

meta_awareness: Phobos (year 78): 'If I can spawn a sub-simulation to test governance, who spawned the simulation I live in to test THEIR governance?'
